title: Attention-throughout: a latent diffusion approach for single domain generalization in machinery fault diagnosis
abstract: Domain Generalization (DG) has been explored to achieve machine fault diagnosis under previously unseen operating conditions. However, most DG methods assume access to training data collected across multiple conditions, an assumption that rarely holds in industrial practice, where fault data are typically available from only a single operating condition. To address this critical constraint, we propose an attention-throughout latent diffusion model for single-source domain generalization (ATLD-SSDG). The proposed framework learns discriminative fault representations from a single-condition source domain and generalizes robustly to multiple unseen target conditions. First, to effectively capture complementary fault information, vibration signals from three views are fused and projected into a latent space via a collaborative attention fusion mechanism. Next, a dedicated one-dimensional (1D) U-Net is constructed to address information loss in existing approaches and facilitate more effective conditional diffusion. Unlike existing methods that directly adopt computer vision diffusion architectures, the proposed 1D U-Net is specifically designed for vibration signals, preserving localized fault-related details and preventing information loss caused by time–frequency transformations. Moreover, by explicitly regulating self-attention and cross-attention within the diffusion model, the framework preserves fault-relevant characteristics while selectively substituting operating-condition-related factors, thereby enabling controllable and effective domain generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior generalization performance and diagnostic accuracy of the proposed method over state-of-the-art DG methods. These results indicate that latent diffusion, when properly structured for 1D condition-monitoring signals, provides an effective mechanism for single-source domain generalization, helping to close an important gap in DG research for predictive maintenance.

title_cn: 注意力贯穿：一种用于机械故障诊断单域泛化的潜在扩散方法
abstract_cn: 领域泛化（DG）已被研究以实现机器故障诊断，特别是在以前未见的操作条件下。然而，大多数DG方法假设可以访问在多种条件下收集的训练数据，这一假设在工业实践中往往不成立，因为故障数据通常只在单一操作条件下可用。为了解决这一关键限制，我们提出了一种用于单源领域泛化的全程注意力潜在扩散模型（ATLD-SSDG）。该框架从单一条件源域学习出具有区分性的故障表征，并能在多个未见目标条件下进行稳健泛化。首先，为了有效捕捉互补的故障信息，我们将来自三种视角的振动信号融合，并通过协同注意力融合机制投影到潜在空间。接下来，构建了一个专用的一维（1D）U-Net，以解决现有方法中的信息损失问题，并促进更有效的条件扩散。与直接采用计算机视觉扩散架构的现有方法不同，所提议的1D U-Net专门设计用于振动信号，保留了局部的故障相关细节，并防止因时频转换而导致的信息损失。此外，通过明确调节扩散模型中的自注意力和交叉注意力，框架在选择性替代与操作条件相关的因素的同时，保留了故障相关特征，从而实现可控且有效的领域泛化。大量实验表明，所提方法在泛化性能和诊断准确性上优于最先进的DG方法。这些结果表明，适当构建的潜在扩散模型对于一维状态监测信号提供了一种有效的单源领域泛化机制，帮助缩小了预测维护研究中DG研究的重要差距。

title: Spatiotemporal analysis of thermal comfort profile based on deep learning and refined computational fluid dynamics
abstract: Purpose This study aims to provide a detailed spatiotemporal analysis of indoor thermal comfort by introducing a novel approach for reconstructing air temperature and air velocity fields. Design/methodology/approach Strategic deep neural networks and refined computational fluid dynamics (CFD) were employed to reconstruct the air temperature and air velocity fields across five cases with varying window configurations and air diffusers. The predicted mean vote (PMV) and predicted percentage of dissatisfied (PPD) metrics, calculated based on the simulated air temperature and air velocity, were used to assess thermal sensation. Findings The refined CFD simulation approach could reveal a nonuniform distribution of air temperature, while the proposed deep neural networks enable precise and rapid reconstruction of the global temperature and air velocity distribution using only limited measurement data as input and eliminating the need for case-specific model fine-tuning. The spatiotemporal analysis of thermal comfort profiles reveals a nonuniform distribution of thermal comfort within the case office rooms, with cooler areas observed in the central middle of the space. This nonuniform thermal comfort profile may be influenced by design features such as window configurations and air diffusers, with a higher temperature observed near the window facades and the top ceiling. Research limitations/implications The proposed reconstruction methods are scalable to real-world empirical cases with various configurations, enabling accurate and efficient indoor environment modeling, which can further facilitate the design and optimization of real-time heating, ventilation and air conditioning control systems. The simulated spatiotemporal thermal comfort profile can serve as a valuable reference for building managers in climate regulation and space allocation, promoting a comprehensive approach to enhancing energy efficiency while maintaining thermal comfort. Originality/value This research presents a novel approach for reconstructing air temperature fields using deep neural networks, which require minimal data volume and are independent of boundary conditions, coupled with a refined CFD method that reveals the spatiotemporal patterns of air temperature and air velocity rather than relying on statistical mean estimations. Together, these techniques enable more detailed, dynamic and accurate analyses of thermal comfort.
title_cn: 基于深度学习和精细化计算流体动力学的热舒适空间时间分析
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在通过引入一种新颖的方法来重建空气温度和空气速度场，提供室内热舒适性的详细时空分析。 设计/方法论/方法 采用战略深度神经网络和精细化计算流体力学（CFD）方法，在具有不同窗户配置和空气扩散器的五种情况下重建空气温度和空气速度场。基于模拟的空气温度和空气速度计算的预测平均投票（PMV）和预测不满意百分比（PPD）指标用于评估热感受。 发现 精细化CFD模拟方法能够揭示空气温度的非均匀分布，而所提出的深度神经网络则能够仅利用有限的测量数据作为输入，精确快速地重建全球温度和空气速度分布，从而消除对特定案例模型微调的需求。热舒适性剖面的时空分析揭示了案例办公室房间内热舒适性的非均匀分布，空间中央中部观察到较凉爽的区域。此非均匀热舒适性剖面可能受到窗户配置和空气扩散器等设计特征的影响，靠近窗户立面和顶部天花板的温度较高。 研究局限性/影响 所提议的重建方法可扩展到具有各种配置的实际案例，能够实现准确和高效的室内环境建模，这进一步促进了实时供暖、通风和空调控制系统的设计与优化。模拟的时空热舒适性剖面可以为建筑管理者在气候调节和空间分配中提供宝贵参考，推动在维持热舒适的同时提升能源效率的综合方法。 原创性/价值 本研究提出了一种使用深度神经网络重建空气温度场的新颖方法，该方法需要最少的数据量且不依赖于边界条件，并结合了一种精细化CFD方法，揭示空气温度和空气速度的时空模式，而不是依赖于统计平均估计。这些技术共同实现了对热舒适性更为详细、动态和准确的分析。

title: Predicting construction safety accidents using VMD-BiGRU architecture with improved snake optimization algorithm
abstract: Purpose The construction industry has persistently high occupational accident rates due to diverse project types and complex operations. Conventional time series models struggle with the accident data's nonlinear and multi scale features, limiting predictive accuracy. This study develops a robust forecasting framework to support proactive construction safety management. Design/methodology/approach We propose a hybrid VMD-ISO-BiGRU framework. This model uses Variational Mode Decomposition (VMD) for multiscale feature extraction, Improved Snake Optimization (ISO) for adaptive hyperparameter tuning, and Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Units (BiGRU) to capture bidirectional temporal dependencies. Using weekly OSHA data from January 2015 to October 2024, VMD decomposes non stationary sequences into intrinsic mode functions (IMFs); ISO optimizes BiGRU parameters; and the model is trained and validated for short and long term predictions. Findings The framework substantially outperforms baselines, reducing short term Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) by 94% (0.5478 vs. 8.8289) for BiGRU and long term RMSE by 90% (1.1726 vs 11.2458) for BiGRU. It effectively captures multiscale patterns, nonlinearities, and bidirectional temporal dependencies in accident data. Practical implications The framework enables early identification of high risk periods, supporting proactive interventions, resource allocation, and policy development to reduce accidents and improve industry sustainability. Originality/value By integrating signal decomposition, optimization, and deep learning, the VMD ISO BiGRU model offers a novel, interpretable, and high precision tool for forecasting construction safety accidents.
title_cn: 使用改进的蛇形优化算法的VMD-BiGRU架构预测建筑安全事故
abstract_cn: 目的 建筑行业由于项目类型多样和操作复杂，职业事故发生率一直居高不下。传统时间序列模型难以应对事故数据的非线性和多尺度特征，限制了预测的准确性。本研究开发了一套稳健的预测框架，以支持主动的建筑安全管理。设计/方法论/途径 我们提出了一种混合VMD-ISO-BiGRU框架。该模型利用变分模式分解（VMD）进行多尺度特征提取，采用改进的蛇优化（ISO）进行自适应超参数调整，并通过双向门控循环单元（BiGRU）捕捉双向时间依赖关系。基于2015年1月至2024年10月的每周OSHA数据，VMD将非平稳序列分解为固有模式函数（IMFs）；ISO对BiGRU参数进行优化；该模型经过训练和验证，用于短期和长期预测。发现 该框架在性能上显著优于基线模型，短期均方根误差（RMSE）减少了94%（0.5478对比8.8289），而长期RMSE减少了90%（1.1726对比11.2458）。它有效捕捉了事故数据中的多尺度模式、非线性特征及双向时间依赖关系。实践意义 该框架有助于早期识别高风险时期，支持主动干预、资源配置和政策制定，从而减少事故并改善行业可持续性。原创性/价值 通过整合信号分解、优化和深度学习，VMD ISO BiGRU模型为预测建筑安全事故提供了一种新颖、可解释且高精度的工具。

title: Context matters: understanding energy-conservation behaviors in Chinese educational buildings through environmental perception and external factors
abstract: Purpose Occupants' energy-conservation behaviors (ECBs) have been emphasized to improve energy efficiency. This study aims to assess the mechanisms of ECBs in educational buildings by incorporating individuals' environmental perception (environmental knowledge (EK) and awareness of consequences (AWC)) and external physical environmental factors (occupancy and indoor environment quality (IEQ)) into the theory of planned behavior (TPB) model. Design/methodology/approach This study collected data from 369 occupants in Chinese educational buildings via a questionnaire survey and analyzed them using partial least squares structural equation modeling and a hierarchical regression model. Findings This study finds that EK and AWC not only directly contribute to ECBs but also exert their influence indirectly by shaping individuals' behavioral intentions, indicating that cultivating intention is crucial for translating knowledge and awareness into action. Besides, the extent to which EK translates into ECBs is conditional on the occupancy level. The effectiveness of awareness in promoting ECBs is contingent upon the quality of the indoor environment. Occupancy and indoor environment quality also act as moderators in the relationship between intention and ECBs. Together, this study provides a nuanced understanding of the psychological and environmental factors driving ECBs. Originality/value Previous studies about ECBs mainly focused on the effects of occupants' psychological factors while neglecting the impacts of their environmental perception and physical environments. More importantly, there is limited research about ECBs in educational buildings, despite being the third most energy-intensive. The findings are not only an echo of TPB but also shed light on the theoretical contributions to the literature about environmental perception, external environment and ECBs. This study may facilitate decision-makers in universities and governments to design effective energy interventions.
title_cn: 背景很重要：通过环境感知和外部因素理解中国教育建筑中的节能行为
abstract_cn: 目的 为提高能源效率，强调了居住者的节能行为（ECB）。本研究旨在通过将个体的环境认知（环境知识（EK）和后果意识（AWC））以及外部物理环境因素（居住率和室内环境质量（IEQ））纳入计划行为理论（TPB）模型，评估教育建筑中ECB的机制。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究通过问卷调查收集了来自369名中国教育建筑居住者的数据，并使用偏最小二乘结构方程建模和分层回归模型进行分析。 结果 本研究发现，EK和AWC不仅直接促进ECB，也通过影响个体的行为意图间接发挥作用，表明培养意图对将知识和意识转化为行动至关重要。此外，EK转化为ECB的程度依赖于居住率的水平。意识在促进ECB方面的有效性取决于室内环境的质量。居住率和室内环境质量在意图与ECB之间的关系中也起到调节作用。综上所述，本研究提供了对驱动ECB的心理和环境因素的细致理解。 原创性/价值 以往关于ECB的研究主要集中于居住者的心理因素影响，而忽视了其环境认知和物理环境的影响。更重要的是，尽管教育建筑是第三大能耗建筑，但对其ECB的研究仍相对有限。研究结果不仅呼应了TPB理论，而且为环境认知、外部环境与ECB文献的理论贡献提供了新视角。本研究可能有助于大学和政府的决策者设计有效的能源干预措施。

title: Advancing Digital Transformation through Virtual Project Management: An Evidence-Based Implementation Framework in the Built Environment Industry
abstract: Virtual project management (VPM) is an emerging project management approach leveraging advanced digital technologies within the built environment industry. However, there is a lack of an evidence-based framework to guide the successful implementation of VPM. Therefore, this study aims to (1) investigate the critical drivers and barriers of VPM implementation, as well as the differences across different organizational characteristics; (2) identify feasible strategies for the effective implementation of VPM; and (3) develop a structured VPM implementation and strategy framework (VPM-ISF). To achieve the objectives, this study integrated findings from comprehensive literature reviews, expert panel interviews, and empirical analyses to identify the significances and differences of drivers, barriers, and strategies for implementing VPM. The results indicated that the critical drivers include real-time monitoring, off-site inspection capabilities, improved collaboration, and reduced project delays. Significant barriers encompass privacy and data security issues, high costs of system incorporation, and concerns over investments. Prominent strategies involve financial incentives, clear role delineation, and increased research and development. Additionally, these factors were perceived differently across organizational characteristics. To minimize subjective biases, the composite score analysis reveals factors with the highest overall influence by integrating entropy-driven weights with importance ratings. For drivers, fostering collaboration, ensuring schedule reliability, and improving project quality emerged as the most impactful. For barriers, inaccurate data, organizational resistance, and technical challenges dominated, and the most influential strategies included establishing technical standards, hiring specialized talent, and promoting interorganizational knowledge transfer. Finally, the VPM-ISF was developed to holistically integrate these findings into a structured framework. This study deepened the understanding of VPM and laid the foundation for organizations to effectively implement VPM, contributing to the digital transformation and sustainable development of the industry.
title_cn: 通过虚拟项目管理推动数字转型：建筑环境行业的基于证据的实施框架
abstract_cn: 虚拟项目管理（VPM）是一种新兴的项目管理方法，利用先进的数字技术在建筑环境行业中进行改进。然而，目前缺乏基于证据的框架来指导VPM的成功实施。因此，本研究旨在（1）探讨VPM实施的关键驱动因素和障碍，以及不同组织特征之间的差异；（2）识别有效实施VPM的可行策略；（3）建立一个结构化的VPM实施与策略框架（VPM-ISF）。为了实现这些目标，本研究通过综合文献回顾、专家小组访谈和实证分析整合了相关发现，以识别实施VPM的驱动因素、障碍和策略的显著性与差异。结果表明，关键驱动因素包括实时监控、远程检查能力、改善协作和减少项目延误。显著障碍包括隐私和数据安全问题、系统整合的高成本以及对投资的担忧。主要策略则涉及财务激励、明确角色划分以及增加研发投入。此外，这些因素在不同组织特征下的感知也各不相同。为了最小化主观偏见，综合评分分析通过将熵驱动的权重与重要性评分结合，揭示了影响因素的总体影响力。对于驱动因素，促进协作、确保进度可靠性和提高项目质量被认为是最具影响力的。对于障碍，不准确的数据、组织抵抗和技术挑战占主导地位，而最具影响力的策略则包括建立技术标准、招聘专业人才和促进跨组织知识转移。最后，VPM-ISF被开发出来，旨在将这些发现全面整合为一个结构化框架。本研究加深了对VPM的理解，为组织有效实施VPM奠定了基础，促进了行业的数字转型和可持续发展。

title: Applications of artificial intelligence in the detection and prevention of assaults against healthcare Staff: A systematic review
abstract: • AI can detect and prevent violence against healthcare staff in real time. • Machine learning predicts aggression using clinical notes and behavior data. • NLP identifies verbal threats and abusive language with high accuracy. • Predictive AI models outperform traditional risk assessment methods in healthcare violence prevention. • AI tools improve staff safety, response times, and overall care quality. The rising incidence of physical, verbal, and psychological assaults on healthcare workers has become a critical occupational and public health concern. Such incidents negatively impact staff well-being, contribute to burnout, and compromise the overall quality of patient care. To explore how artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, including machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing, can be applied in healthcare settings to detect, prevent, or mitigate workplace assaults against healthcare staff. Additionally, it sought to identify the most effective technical and ethical strategies for implementing AI-based interventions. A systematic review was performed following the PRISMA 2020 guidelines. Searches were conducted between July and August 2025 in electronic databases (PubMed, Scopus, Web of Science, CINAHL, IEEE Xplorer, and Google Scholar) and AI-assisted bibliographic tools (Perplexity, SciSpace, and Elicit). Studies were screened and assessed for methodological quality using the Joanna Briggs Institute critical appraisal tools. Seventeen studies met the inclusion criteria. Evidence indicates that AI can play a substantial role in enhancing staff safety. Approaches include smart sensors for real-time detection of aggressive behaviors, deep learning models analyzing clinical notes to predict violent incidents, advanced natural language processing systems (BERT, GPT, RAG-ECE) for identifying threatening language, and interpretable machine learning algorithms (LightGBM-SHAP-ALE) for pinpointing key risk factors. Predicting and preventing violence in healthcare is a complex challenge requiring multidisciplinary solutions. AI offers promising tools for early detection, accurate prediction, and effective intervention. However, implementation must consider technical limitations, algorithmic bias, privacy concerns, and the necessity of human oversight.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 人工智能在医护人员攻击检测和预防中的应用：系统评价
abstract_cn:
• 人工智能可以实时检测和防止对医疗工作人员的暴力行为。 
• 机器学习通过临床笔记和行为数据预测攻击性行为。 
• 自然语言处理能够高精准度识别语言威胁和侮辱性语言。 
• 预测性人工智能模型在医疗暴力预防方面的表现优于传统风险评估方法。 
• 人工智能工具提高了员工安全、响应时间和整体护理质量。 

对医疗工作者的身体、语言和心理攻击事件日益频繁，已成为一个关键的职业与公共健康问题。这些事件对员工的福祉产生负面影响，助长了职业倦怠，并削弱了患者护理的整体质量。研究旨在探讨人工智能技术，包括机器学习、深度学习和自然语言处理，如何在医疗环境中应用，以检测、防止或减轻对医疗工作人员的工作场所攻击。此外，还希望识别实施基于人工智能的干预措施的最有效技术和伦理策略。

按照PRISMA 2020指南，进行了系统评价。在2025年7月至8月期间，利用电子数据库（PubMed、Scopus、Web of Science、CINAHL、IEEE Xplorer和Google Scholar）及人工智能辅助的文献工具（Perplexity、SciSpace和Elicit）进行了文献检索。使用乔安娜·布里格斯研究所的批判性评估工具对研究进行筛选和方法学质量评估。一共符合纳入标准的研究达到17项。证据表明，人工智能在增强员工安全方面可以发挥重要作用。具体方法包括用于实时检测攻击性行为的智能传感器、分析临床笔记以预测暴力事件的深度学习模型、用于识别威胁性语言的先进自然语言处理系统（如BERT、GPT、RAG-ECE）以及用于识别关键风险因素的可解释机器学习算法（如LightGBM-SHAP-ALE）。预测和防止医疗行业的暴力行为是一项复杂的挑战，需要多学科解决方案。人工智能为早期检测、精准预测和有效干预提供了有希望的工具。然而，实施过程中必须考虑技术限制、算法偏见、隐私问题以及人类监督的必要性。

title: Source tolerant iterative domain adaptation for inexpensive modeling of knowledge-deficient manufacturing processes
abstract: • Focus on reducing both experiments and knowledge needed for manufacturing modeling. • Created new AI-based framework to address foundational challenge of concept drift. • Modified iterative Transfer Learning with correlation-loss-driven source update. • Achieved 63% lesser error and 73% lesser experiments than conventional AI. • Robust to large concept drift that causes failure of conventional Transfer Learning. Modeling of parameter-attribute relationships in manufacturing processes is resource-intensive and time-consuming due to the need for significant experimental data (experimental burden) or qualitatively accurate knowledge of material/machine behavior (knowledge burden). Transfer Learning shows potential to address this issue but frequently fails under concept drift, i.e., change in qualitative form of the parameter-attribute relationship from source to target. This work proposes a new framework called Source Tolerant Learning via Iterative Domain Adaptation (STOLID) to address this knowledge-experiment tradeoff, a first in manufacturing, whose core innovation lies in iterative domain adaptation for mitigating concept drift via correlation-driven source updating and repeated transfer learning. The AI novelty lies in relaxing the need for high qualitative similarity between source and target in Transfer Learning (to mitigate knowledge burden) while extracting useful information from the source (to mitigate experimental burden) by introducing incremental correlation-loss-driven update of the source with iterative quantitative-loss-driven Transfer Learning. Testing across three mechanistically distinct processes (i.e., additive, subtractive, forming) demonstrates up to 63% enhancement in prediction accuracy and up to 74% reduction in experimental burden relative to conventional brute force Machine Learning, even when incomplete knowledge of the form of the relationship causes the state-of-the-art Transfer Learning to fail under concept drift. The implications for experimentally inexpensive modeling of hitherto intractable processes or attributes are discussed.
title_cn: 源容忍迭代领域适应用于低成本建模知识缺乏的制造过程
abstract_cn:
• 重点减少制造建模所需的实验和知识。 
• 创建了一个基于人工智能的新框架，以解决概念漂移的基础性挑战。 
• 修改了迭代迁移学习，采用了基于相关性损失的源更新。 
• 实现了比传统人工智能减少63%的误差和减少73%的实验。 
• 对于导致传统迁移学习失效的大规模概念漂移具有较强的鲁棒性。 

制造过程中参数-属性关系的建模是资源密集型和耗时的，因为它需要大量实验数据（实验负担）或对材料/机器行为的定性准确知识（知识负担）。迁移学习显示出解决这一问题的潜力，但在概念漂移的情况下往往会失败，即参数-属性关系从源到目标的定性形式发生变化。本研究提出了一个新的框架，称为通过迭代领域适应的源容忍学习（STOLID），以解决这一知识-实验权衡，这在制造领域是首创，其核心创新在于通过相关性驱动的源更新和重复迁移学习来减轻因概念漂移带来的问题。该人工智能的新颖之处在于放宽了迁移学习中源与目标之间高定性相似性的需求（以减轻知识负担），同时通过引入基于增量相关性损失的源更新与基于定量损失的迭代迁移学习，从源中提取有用信息（以减轻实验负担）。在三种机制上显著不同的过程中（即增材、减材、成型）进行测试，展示了相较于传统的暴力机器学习，预测准确性提升高达63%，实验负担减少高达74%，即使当关系的形式知识不完整时，也会导致最先进的迁移学习在概念漂移下失败。讨论了对于以往难以解决的过程或属性进行实验费用低的建模的影响。

title: In-process reinforcement method for 3D-printed concrete layers
abstract: State-of-the-art methods for reinforcement of 3D printed concrete layers require manual intervention, cause poor bonding between concrete and reinforcement, or result in a disrupted concrete flow. This paper presents an automated reinforcement method. A printhead bifurcates the incoming concrete flow and merges the two streams near a tapered outlet, while a fiber mesh is fed from an integrated spool and embedded within the printed layer. Mesh reinforced concrete was printed along linear and curved paths. A greater path radius helped reduce out-of-plane distortion in the mesh (and concrete) along curvilinear paths. Compaction due to tapering in the printhead reduced amount of voids near mesh, and increased green strength and mesh pull-out force in the fresh state. Cubes extracted from printed beams exhibited strength comparable to mould-cast specimens. The presence of fiber mesh substantially enhanced the deformability of printed beams. • Developed a printhead to automatically reinforce concrete layers during printing. • Tapered end of printhead allowed effective integration of mesh within printer layers. • Intra-layer mesh reinforcement led to substantial increase in green strength. • Mesh reinforcement led to significant increase in the deformability of printed beams.

title_cn: 3D打印混凝土层的过程内增强方法
abstract_cn: 最先进的3D打印混凝土层加固方法需要手动干预，导致混凝土与加固材料之间的粘结差差，或者造成混凝土流动的中断。本文提出了一种自动化加固方法。一种打印头将进入的混凝土流分叉，并在一个锥形出口附近将两个流体合并，同时从一个集成卷轴中输送纤维网并嵌入到打印层中。网状加固混凝土沿线性和曲线路径进行了打印。较大的路径半径有助于减少沿曲线路径的网格（和混凝土）的面外变形。打印头的锥形设计促使在网格附近减少了空隙，并在新鲜状态下增加了绿色强度和网格拔出力。从打印梁中提取的立方体展现出与模具铸造样本相当的强度。纤维网的存在显著增强了打印梁的变形能力。 • 开发了一种打印头，以在打印过程中自动加固混凝土层。 • 打印头的锥形端允许在打印层中有效整合网格。 • 层内网格加固显著提高了绿色强度。 • 网格加固显著增强了打印梁的变形能力。

title: Unsupervised Deep Learning and Bayesian Network–Based Identification of Key Risk Factors in Construction Quality Defects
abstract: To accurately identify construction quality risk factors and analyze their underlying mechanisms, this study develops an integrated framework combining unsupervised semantic clustering with causal network analysis. The M3E-large sentence embeddings and latent Dirichlet allocation (LDA) model are applied for text vectorization and topic extraction, followed by keyword clustering using an improved canopy K-means algorithm. A systematic classification framework of risk factors is further established through three-level coding and a priori association rule mining. Subsequently, the interpretive structural modeling (ISM) method is employed to map factor dependencies and clarify hierarchical relationships, while a Bayesian network (BN) is constructed for risk assessment to quantify causal relationships and sensitivity. Based on 2,047 defect entries derived from 785 construction quality reports and five management manuals collected in China between 2014 and 2024, the results show that the proposed clustering model achieves better key information extraction performance than the traditional LDA (F1=0.81 versus 0.52). Compared with the unconstrained BN (75.3%), the ISM-BN demonstrates higher mean accuracy (83.7%) on the test set, indicating stronger stability. From real construction cases, 20 high-frequency factors, 25 key factors, and 30 sensitive factors are identified. Comprehensive analysis further summarizes five major categories of core driving risks: institutional system; structural safety; material equipment; technical compliance; and measurement monitoring. Among these, nine factors, including inadequate training system, undeveloped management system, supporting node failures, concrete structure deficiencies, substandard material processing and forming, mechanical transmission failures, coating surface treatment deficiencies, poor drainage slope and joint leakage, and excessive measurement errors, are identified as core drivers. The findings suggest that construction quality management should shift from reactive remediation to proactive prevention, emphasizing institutional development, personnel training, and process monitoring. This study provides an effective approach for extracting information from unstructured texts and analyzing complex risk mechanisms, thereby improving the efficiency of human error management.
title_cn: 无监督深度学习与基于贝叶斯网络的建筑质量缺陷关键风险因素识别
abstract_cn: 为准确识别施工质量风险因素并分析其潜在机制，本研究开发了一个综合框架，将无监督语义聚类与因果网络分析相结合。采用M3E-large句子嵌入和潜在狄利克雷分配（LDA）模型进行文本向量化和主题提取，然后利用改进的Canopy K-means算法进行关键词聚类。通过三层编码和先验关联规则挖掘，进一步建立了一套系统的风险因素分类框架。随后，采用解释性结构建模（ISM）方法绘制因素依赖关系图，并明确层级关系，同时构建贝叶斯网络（BN）进行风险评估，以量化因果关系和敏感性。基于2014至2024年间收集的785份施工质量报告和五本管理手册中提取的2,047个缺陷条目，结果表明，所提出的聚类模型在关键信息提取性能上优于传统的LDA（F1=0.81对比0.52）。与不受约束的贝叶斯网络（75.3%）相比，ISM-BN在测试集上的平均准确率更高（83.7%），表明其稳定性更强。从真实的施工案例中识别出20个高频因素、25个关键因素和30个敏感因素。综合分析进一步总结出五大核心驱动风险类别：制度体系、结构安全、材料设备、技术合规以及测量监控。在这些类别中，九个因素被识别为核心驱动因素，包括培训体系不足、管理体系欠发达、支撑节点故障、混凝土结构缺陷、材料加工与成型不合格、机械传动故障、涂层表面处理不足、排水坡度差及接缝漏水，以及过度测量误差。研究结果表明，施工质量管理应从被动补救转向主动预防，强调制度建设、人员培训和过程监控。本研究为从非结构化文本中提取信息和分析复杂风险机制提供了一种有效的方法，从而提高人力错误管理的效率。

title: Evaluating how effective project planning influences construction delays by examining planning quality, resource allocation and risk mitigation strategies
abstract: Purpose This paper discusses the degree to which the project planning practices relate to construction delays, in three fundamental dimensions, namely, the planning quality, efficiency of resource allocation and the mitigation of risks associated with the project planning practices. Design/methodology/approach A total of 360 construction industry stakeholders, including project managers, site engineers, contractors, consultants and senior supervisors, participated in the study. Data were collected through a structured questionnaire and analysed using SPSS and structural equation modelling (SEM). Findings The results suggest the existence of a strong positive relationship between a high quality of planning, a better alignment of resources and the proactive development of risk mitigation practices and schedule overruns in construction projects. The findings also indicate that planning processes with well-defined scope, integration of the stakeholders and realistic scheduling are associated with predictable schedules. The allocation of resources, especially labour, materials and equipment, seems to facilitate workflow continuity, whereas risk mitigation practices are observed to help in handling the uncertainties which usually knock out the project development. Research limitations/implications Despite its contributions, the study is limited by its cross-sectional design and reliance on self-reported data, which may restrict causal inference and generalizability across different project types and geographical contexts. Practical implications The paper has also gone deeper into proper project planning as a method of minimizing delay in construction. Originality/value This study integrates advanced planning tools with empirical analysis to highlight the combined influence of planning quality, resource management and technological moderation on construction project outcomes.
title_cn: 通过研究规划质量、资源配置和风险缓解策略，评估项目规划的有效性如何影响建筑施工延误。
abstract_cn: 目的 本文探讨项目规划实践与施工延误之间的关系，主要从三个基本维度进行分析，即规划质量、资源配置效率以及与项目规划实践相关的风险缓解。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究共邀请360位建筑行业利益相关者参与，包括项目经理、现场工程师、承包商、顾问和高级监督员。通过结构化问卷收集数据，并使用SPSS和结构方程模型（SEM）对数据进行了分析。 研究结果 结果表明，高质量的规划、资源的更好对接以及积极的风险缓解实践与建筑项目的超期之间存在显著的正相关关系。研究还指出，范围清晰、利益相关者整合及现实可行的计划安排与可预测的项目进度相关联。资源的配置，尤其是劳动力、材料和设备，似乎可以促进工作流程的连续性，而风险缓解实践则有助于应对通常会影响项目进展的不确定性。 研究局限性/影响 尽管本研究有所贡献，但其横断面设计及依赖自我报告数据的限制，可能会影响因果推断的能力及在不同项目类型和地理环境中的外推性。 实际意义 本文进一步探讨了通过适当的项目规划来最小化施工延误的方法。 独创性/价值 本研究将先进的规划工具与实证分析相结合，突出规划质量、资源管理与技术调解对建筑项目结果的综合影响。

title: Collaborative strategies of multiple subjects on “zero-waste construction site” – an evolutionary game analysis
abstract: Purpose The promotion of “Zero-Waste Construction Sites” (ZWCS) is caught in a dilemma between insufficient effectiveness of unilateral government governance and a lack of initiative from enterprises to participate. Accordingly, this study aims to explore how to enhance construction enterprises' enthusiasm for building ZWCS through government incentive strategies and the involvement of industry associations, as well as how to effectively integrate the government's guiding role with the coordinating role of industry associations. Design/methodology/approach This study constructs an evolutionary game model and conducts simulation experiments to systematically analyze the strategic interactions among multiple stakeholders in the construction of ZWCS. It specifically examines the decision-making behaviors and evolutionary dynamics of the three core interest entities: the government, industry associations, and construction enterprises. Findings The study shows that the government plays a leading role in the incubation stage of ZWCS, and appropriate subsidies and penalties can dynamically adapt to the development of ZWCS at each stage, while high incremental costs inhibit the motivation of construction enterprises to build ZWCS. The participation of industry associations can transfer the regulatory functions of the government, save the cost of ZWCS, and help to stimulate the participation of all parties. Originality/value This study develops an effective governance framework for ZWCS, centered on government guidance, association coordination, and enterprise participation, by deciphering the underlying collaborative mechanisms among these three stakeholders. This approach offers a promising pathway to support the “Zero Waste City” initiative and contribute to high-quality development within the construction industry.
title_cn: 多个主体在“零废弃建筑工地”上的协作策略——演化博弈分析
abstract_cn: 目的 “零废弃施工现场”（ZWCS）的推广面临单方政府治理有效性不足与企业参与主动性缺乏之间的困境。因此，本研究旨在探讨如何通过政府激励策略和行业协会的参与，增强建筑企业建设ZWCS的积极性，以及如何有效整合政府的引导作用与行业协会的协调作用。 设计/方法/途径 本研究构建了一个演化博弈模型，并进行模拟实验，以系统分析建筑ZWCS中多个利益相关者之间的战略互动。具体考察了三大核心利益主体：政府、行业协会与建筑企业的决策行为和演化动态。 研究发现 研究表明，政府在ZWCS的孵化阶段发挥主导作用，适当的补贴和惩罚措施能够动态适应ZWCS各个阶段的发展，而高额的增量成本则抑制了建筑企业建设ZWCS的积极性。行业协会的参与能够转移政府的监管职能，节省ZWCS的成本，并帮助激发各方的参与动力。 原创性/价值 本研究通过解码这三大利益相关者之间的潜在协作机制，开发了一个以政府引导、协会协调和企业参与为中心的ZWCS有效治理框架。这一方法为支持“零废弃城市”倡议提供了有前景的路径，并为建筑行业的高质量发展做出贡献。

title: Holding the egg: ethical tensions of care in safety-critical technologies
abstract: • Conceptualising ethical care after deployment in safety–critical systems. • CARE-TECH framework reveals tensions in sustaining safety over time. • Responsibility persists despite declining steerability and exit options. • Long-lived technologies generate cumulative ethical burdens in practice. • Framework supports empirical research on post-deployment responsibility. Safety-critical technologies frequently persist for decades, outliving their original design assumptions, organisational arrangements, and regulatory contexts. Yet ethical and safety scholarship remains predominantly oriented toward early lifecycle phases, emphasising design assurance, deployment decisions, and prevention, while offering limited conceptual resources for understanding responsibility once systems are already in operation, ageing, and increasingly difficult to modify or withdraw. This paper develops a conceptual account of ethical care after deployment, referring to forms of responsibility that persist once safety–critical technologies become operationally embedded and remain in use while practical steerability, authority, epistemic certainty, and exit options gradually erode. The animated film Angel’s Egg (Oshii, 1985) is used as a heuristic device—not as empirical evidence or film analysis—to surface ethical tensions associated with sustaining fragile systems over time. On this basis, the paper proposes a preliminary conceptual framework for examining ethical conditions that remain weakly captured by prevailing safety concepts. The resulting CARE-TECH framework identifies six interrelated tensions: care without repair, responsibility without authority, care under epistemic uncertainty, fragility without exit, inherited burden, and irreversibility of ethical failure. The framework further clarifies how these tensions cluster as limits of agency and temporal–epistemic burdens, sustained by structural conditions of persistence and shaped by an ethical horizon of irreversibility. The contribution is intentionally conceptual, offering a vocabulary to recognise and analyse the accumulation and distribution of ethical burden across the operational life of safety–critical technologies, and outlining directions for empirical engagement in domains where long-lived systems must be sustained under constraint.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 抱持着蛋：安全关键技术中关怀的伦理紧张关系
abstract_cn: • 概念化安全关键系统部署后的伦理关怀。 • CARE-TECH框架揭示了在时间维度上维持安全的紧张关系。 • 尽管可控性和退出选项下降，责任仍然存在。 • 长期存在的技术在实践中产生累积的伦理负担。 • 该框架支持对部署后责任的实证研究。 安全关键技术通常会持续数十年，超出其原有的设计假设、组织安排和监管背景。然而，伦理和安全研究仍然主要集中于生命周期的早期阶段，强调设计保证、部署决策和预防，同时提供了有限的概念资源，以理解当系统已经投入运行、老化并且越来越难以修改或撤回时的责任。本文发展了一个关于部署后伦理关怀的概念性论述，指的是在安全关键技术变得操作上嵌入并持续使用时，尽管实际的可控性、权威、知识确定性和退出选项逐渐削弱，依然存在的责任形式。动画电影《天使之蛋》（押井守，1985）被用作启发性工具——而非实证证据或电影分析——以揭示与长期维持脆弱系统相关的伦理紧张关系。在此基础上，本文提出了一个初步的概念框架，以审视现有安全概念所未能充分捕捉的伦理条件。最终形成的CARE-TECH框架识别出六种相互关联的紧张关系：无修复的关怀、无权威的责任、不确定知识下的关怀、无退出的脆弱性、遗留负担，以及伦理失败的不可逆性。该框架进一步阐明了这些紧张关系如何聚集为主体能动性的界限和时间-知识负担，受到持久性结构条件的维持，并受到不可逆伦理视野的形塑。这个贡献在概念上有意，提供了一种词汇来识别和分析安全关键技术操作生命周期中的伦理负担的积累和分配，并为那些在约束下必须维持长期系统的领域提供了实证研究的方向。

title: Autonomous UAV Navigation for Close-Range Image Acquisition of Scaffold Joints
abstract: Scaffold joints are critical structural elements that require continuous inspection. However, their small size and wide distribution make manual inspection inefficient. To address this challenge, this paper proposes an autonomous uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV)-based method to efficiently capture close-range images of joints for inspection. The first module generates a real-time three-dimensional (3D) point cloud map using LiDAR and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) and converts it into a bird’s-eye view (BEV) image to provide spatial context. The second module plans scanning paths based on these data and performs three functions: (1) detecting scaffolds in the BEV image using a deep learning model and segments them into scan units; (2) evaluating scan feasibility based on UAV accessibility and obstacles; and (3) prioritizing and selecting the next target based on path efficiency and generates a collision-free trajectory. Experimental results at two outdoor construction sites demonstrated that the proposed method captured close-range images of all joints via autonomous flight, achieving 100% (207 joints) coverage. This study proposes a novel UAV-based method for autonomous close-range scanning of scaffolds, enabling precise monitoring of detailed components such as joints.

title_cn: 自主无人机导航用于支架接头的近距离图像采集
abstract_cn: 脚手架接头是需要持续检查的关键结构元素。然而，由于其体积小且分布广泛，人工检查效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于无人机的自主方法，旨在高效捕捉接头的近距离图像以进行检查。第一个模块使用激光雷达和同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）生成实时三维（3D）点云图，并将其转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）以提供空间上下文。第二个模块基于这些数据规划扫描路径，并执行三个功能：（1）利用深度学习模型在BEV图像中检测脚手架并将其分割为扫描单元；（2）根据无人机的可达性和障碍物评估扫描可行性；（3）基于路径效率优先选择下一个目标，并生成无碰撞轨迹。在两个户外施工现场的实验结果表明，所提方法通过自主飞行成功捕捉到所有接头的近距离图像，达到了100%（207个接头）的覆盖率。本研究提出了一种新颖的基于无人机的脚手架自主近距离扫描方法，能够精确监测接头等详细组件。

title: Development of an inverse method for identifying the hygric properties of hysteretic building materials: Application on cellular concrete and hemp-concrete
abstract: The aim of this study is to develop an inverse method for identifying the hygric properties of hygroscopic building materials from a dynamic testing coupled with numerical modeling. To validate the accuracy of the identified parameters, a hygroscopic characterization campaign is carried out beforehand using standard methods. The study considers both abiotic material (cellular concrete) and biotic material (hemp concrete). The sorption isotherm is measured according to EN NF 12571 standard gravimetric method, including primary desorption curves. These isotherms are modeled using the Van GenHuchten and Huang models. The water vapour permeability is measured according to standard steady-state method EN NF 12572 and the moisture buffer value (MBV) according to the NORDTEST project. The developed inverse method makes it possible to identify sorption isotherms and vapor permeability by adjusting the modeled MBV kinetics to experimental data. This method is based on a combination of the internal heat and mass transfer code, TMC (short for "Transfert de masse et de chaleur" in French), and nonlinear least-squares optimization using the MATLAB solver, lsqcurvefit. Mass gain/loss during MBV test is simulated with TMC, and hygric parameters are identified by minimizing the difference between simulated and experimental kinetics. The robustness of the inverse method, TMC_Id, is assessed. Results are satisfactory for both cellular concrete and hemp-concrete, with and without hysteresis. • An inverse method is developed to identify hygric parameters of building materials • It allows identifying sorption curves with hysteresis or not, and vapour permeability • The experimental data corresponds to kinetics of mass of MBV test • The method is efficient for both abiotic and biotic materials • Its robustness is assessed considering initial values and measurement noise
title_cn: 膨胀建筑材料湿度特性的反演方法开发：在泡沫混凝土和麻混凝土上的应用
abstract_cn: 本研究的目标是开发一种逆向方法，通过与数值建模相结合的动态测试，识别吸湿性建筑材料的潮湿特性。为验证识别参数的准确性，研究前期采用标准方法进行吸湿性表征测试。研究考察了非生物材料（泡沫混凝土）和生物材料（麻混凝土）。根据EN NF 12571标准的重力法测量吸附等温线，包括主要的脱附曲线。这些等温线采用Van Genuchten和Huang模型进行建模。水汽渗透率采用EN NF 12572标准静态方法测量，湿度缓冲值（MBV）则根据NORDTEST项目进行评估。所开发的逆向方法使得通过调整模型的MBV动力学与实验数据相结合，识别吸附等温线和蒸汽渗透率。该方法基于内部热量和质量转移代码TMC（法语“Transfert de masse et de chaleur”的缩写），以及使用MATLAB求解器lsqcurvefit的非线性最小二乘优化。在MBV测试期间，利用TMC模拟质量增减，并通过最小化模拟动力学与实验动力学之间的差异，识别潮湿参数。对逆向方法TMC_Id的稳健性进行了评估。结果表明，无论是否存在滞后，对于泡沫混凝土和麻混凝土均具有令人满意的结果。 • 开发了一种逆向方法，以识别建筑材料的潮湿参数 • 它能够识别具有或不具有滞后的吸附曲线以及蒸汽渗透率 • 实验数据与MBV测试的质量动力学相对应 • 该方法对非生物材料和生物材料均有效 • 考虑初始值和测量噪声评估其稳健性。

title: Lithology identification from missing well log data: a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework
abstract: Accurate lithology identification from well log data is fundamental for reservoir characterization, yet its practical application is often impeded by the dual challenges of incomplete well log data and scarce labeled samples. Existing data-driven methods often address these issues separately or require extensive complete labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in low-resource geological exploration scenarios. To address this compound challenge, this paper proposes a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework, designated as MCG-SSDF, based on a generative pre-training paradigm. The framework first employs a novel multi-constraint guided diffusion model, MCG-Diff, for unsupervised pre-training on large-scale unlabeled data. This model integrates a Mamba backbone with three geological priors, namely a global structural constraint, a petrophysical correlation constraint, and a geological morphological constraint, to enhance the fidelity and physical plausibility of well log data generation and imputation. Subsequently, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy is applied, where only a lightweight classification head is trained on a small set of labeled, incomplete samples, enabling the framework to perform end-to-end lithology identification directly from incomplete data during the inference stage. Systematic evaluations on two oilfield datasets validate the framework across deterministic accuracy and uncertainty quantification. Results reveal that MCG-SSDF outperforms baselines, particularly under extreme label scarcity. Ablation studies and attribution analyses further confirm the synergistic contributions and decision reliability of integrated geological constraints. This methodology provides a robust solution for high-precision lithology identification in low-resource environments.
title_cn: 缺失井测数据的岩性识别：一种多约束引导的自监督扩散框架
abstract_cn: 准确的岩性识别是储层特征描述的基础，但在实际应用中，通常受到不完整井日志数据和稀缺标记样本的双重挑战。现有的数据驱动方法通常分别解决这些问题，或者需要大量完整的标记数据，从而限制了其在低资源地质勘探场景中的有效性。为了解决这一复合挑战，本文提出了一种基于生成预训练范式的多约束引导自监督扩散框架，称为MCG-SSDF。该框架首先采用一种新颖的多约束引导扩散模型MCG-Diff，在大规模无标签数据上进行无监督预训练。该模型将Mamba主干网络与三种地质先验信息集成，包括全球结构约束、岩石物理相关性约束和地质形态约束，以增强井日志数据生成和插值的真实度和物理合理性。随后，应用了一种高效的参数微调策略，仅在一小部分标记的不完整样本上训练轻量级分类头，使得该框架能够在推断阶段直接从不完整数据中进行端到端的岩性识别。对两个油田数据集的系统评估验证了该框架在确定性准确性和不确定性量化方面的有效性。结果表明，MCG-SSDF在极端标签稀缺的情况下，表现优于基线方法。消融研究和归因分析进一步确认了集成地质约束的协同贡献和决策可靠性。这一方法为低资源环境下的高精度岩性识别提供了坚实的解决方案。

title: A method based on double-weighted closeness centrality for identifying firefighting strategies in industrial plants considering domino effects
abstract: • Domino effects are modeled as double-weighted directed graphs. • New relationships are developed for ‘distance’ and ‘closeness centrality’ • Firefighting strategies are identified by minimizing the closeness of burning units. • The method is easy to implement as it is independent of fire spread probabilities. Firefighting at process plants is considered the last line of defence in fire protection. As such, the success and efficiency of firefighting strategies directly impact the safety, integrity, and damage cost of process plants and adjacent on-site and off-site structures and facilities. Suppressing burning units while cooling exposed units is the most intuitive strategy, which is also practiced at process plants, for preventing fire spread and potential domino effects, assuming that firefighting resources (equipment, crew, water, etc.) are sufficient to deal with all the burning and exposed units. However, when firefighting resources are insufficient, models are required to help firefighters identify the most critical units and prioritize viable firefighting strategies accordingly. In the present study, after modelling domino effects as a double-weighted directed graph, i.e., a graph with weighted nodes and edges, it is shown that effective firefighting strategies can be identified by minimizing the closeness centrality of burning units. The developed method not only results in consistent firefighting strategies compared with the risk-based methods in the literature, but also requires fewer input parameters (basically, heat flux and asset monetary values), alleviating the need for calculating the fire escalation probabilities.
title_cn: 一种基于双权重接近中心性的方法，用于识别工业厂房中考虑多米诺效应的灭火策略
abstract_cn:
• 多米诺效应被建模为双权重有向图。  
• 新的关系被提出以描述“距离”和“接近中心性”。  
• 通过最小化燃烧单元的接近性确定灭火策略。  
• 该方法易于实施，因为它不依赖于火灾蔓延概率。  

在过程工业中，灭火被视为火灾防护的最后防线。因此，灭火策略的成功与效率直接影响到过程设施及其附近现场和非现场结构的安全性、完整性和损失成本。在假设灭火资源（设备、人员、水等）充足的情况下，抑制燃烧单元并冷却暴露单元是最直观的策略，在过程工业中也得到了应用，以防止火灾蔓延和潜在的多米诺效应。然而，当灭火资源不足时，需要模型来帮助灭火人员识别最关键的单元，并相应优先考虑可行的灭火策略。在本研究中，在将多米诺效应建模为一个双权重有向图（即具有加权节点和边的图）后，显示通过最小化燃烧单元的接近中心性可以识别有效的灭火策略。所开发的方法不仅与文献中的基于风险的方法相比，产生了一致的灭火策略，而且所需输入参数更少（基本上是热通量和资产货币价值），减轻了计算火灾蔓延概率的需要。

title: Coconut shell waste based activated carbon as a scaffolding of biobased phase change material for enhanced thermal energy storage: Sustainable waste recycling for renewable energy source
abstract: The utilization of cleaner products in the energy sector to promote renewable energy is essential for achieving sustainable development goals. This research investigates the formulation of a biobased phase change material (PCM) composed of a eutectic mixture of capric acid (CA) and myristic acid (MA), using activated carbon derived from waste coconut shells (AC cs ) as a porous scaffold. The main goal of this investigation is twofold: (a) to obtain a biobased PCM with enhanced thermal conductivity and leakage resistance, and (b) to contribute to minimizing the significant environmental burden and waste management concern associated with coconut shell waste. It is shown that the developed composite has the following properties. FTIR and XRD analyses confirm that PCM is physically incorporated within the AC cs matrix without chemical interaction. Meanwhile, SEM reveals a homogeneous impregnation of the PCM within the activated carbon porous structure. A DSC analysis yields a melting enthalpy of 32.5 J/g and a phase transition temperature of 21.8 °C for the composite with the ratio of AC cs to PCM equal to 80 wt%. A TGA analysis further demonstrates the thermal stability of the composite up to 155 °C. The thermal conductivity of AC cs , eutectic PCM (EPCM) and proposed composite PCM (AC cs /EPCM) were determined to be 0.49, 0.17 and 0.30 W/mK, respectively. Thus, the incorporation of the EPCM into the AC cs leads to a 43% enhancement in thermal conductivity. Further, the melting time for EPCM and AC cs /EPCM was determined to be 648 sec and 417 sec, respectively, showing a 35% reduction in time for the proposed composite. After 1000 thermal cycles, the reduction in the latent heat of the composite is marginal, implying its good thermal reliability. These results establish the proposed AC cs /EPCM as a sustainable thermal energy storage material with potential applications in passive temperature regulation for the building sector. • Coconut shell waste recycled for renewable energy source to promote sustainability • Novel Biobased PCM composite with good thermal conductivity and leakage resistance • Coconut Shell based activated Carbon scaffold improves PCM thermal stability. • 43% increase in thermal conductivity via composite PCM incorporation. • Minimal latent heat loss after 1000 thermal cycles ensures reliability. • Sustainable PCM composite suitable for passive building temperature control.
title_cn: 以椰壳废弃物为基础的活性炭作为生物基相变材料的支架，以增强热能储存：可持续废物回收用于可再生能源源
abstract_cn: 在能源领域利用清洁产品以推动可再生能源，对于实现可持续发展目标至关重要。本研究探讨了一种生物基相变材料（PCM）的配方，该材料由癸酸（CA）和肉豆蔻酸（MA）的共晶混合物组成，使用源自废椰壳的活性碳（AC_cs）作为多孔支架。本研究的主要目标有两个：（a）获得具有增强热导率和泄漏阻力的生物基PCM；（b）有助于减少与椰壳废物相关的重大环境负担和废物管理问题。研究表明，所开发的复合材料具有以下特性。FTIR和XRD分析证实，PCM物理上嵌入AC_cs基体中，且没有化学相互作用。同时，SEM揭示了PCM在活性碳多孔结构中的均匀浸渍。DSC分析表明，对于AC_cs与PCM质量比为80 wt%的复合材料，其熔化焓为32.5 J/g，相变温度为21.8 °C。TGA分析进一步表明，该复合材料在155 °C下具有良好的热稳定性。AC_cs、共晶PCM（EPCM）和所提复合PCM（AC_cs/EPCM）的热导率分别为0.49、0.17和0.30 W/mK。因此，将EPCM融入AC_cs中可使热导率提升43%。此外，EPCM和AC_cs/EPCM的熔化时间分别为648秒和417秒，表明所提出的复合材料的熔化时间减少了35%。经过1000个热循环后，复合材料的潜热损耗很小，表明其良好的热可靠性。这些结果确立了所提的AC_cs/EPCM作为一种可持续的热能储存材料，具有在建筑领域被动温度调节的潜在应用。• 利用废椰壳再生为可再生能源源以促进可持续性 • 新型生物基PCM复合材料具有良好的热导率和泄漏阻力 • 基于椰壳的活性碳支架提高了PCM的热稳定性 • 通过复合PCM的引入，热导率提高了43% • 经过1000个热循环后，潜热损失极小，确保了可靠性 • 适用于被动建筑温控的可持续PCM复合材料。

title: Influence of additives and alternative precursors on the properties of lime-activated slag systems
abstract: Lime-activated slag binders offer a low-carbon alternative to Portland cement but remain highly sensitive to precursor chemistry and additive strategy, especially when alternative or waste-derived materials are incorporated. This study investigates the combined effects of synthetic calcium silicate hydrate (C–S–H) seeding and colloidal nano silica on lime-activated slag systems containing bone ash and metakaolin as alternative precursors. Sixteen mixtures were evaluated using a constant water-to-precursor ratio and lime dosage to isolate chemical and microstructural effects. Mechanical performance was assessed through compressive and split tensile strength, while durability-related behaviour was examined using water absorption and porosity measurements. Microstructural evolution and chemical composition were analyzed through scanning electron microscopy and energy dispersive spectroscopy, including elemental mapping and atomic ratio analysis. The results from this study showed that compressive strength is governed primarily by localized densification of reaction products, with nano silica and C–S–H seeding significantly enhancing strength in slag-rich systems. However, these improvements do not always translate into improved tensile resistance or reduced transport properties. Mixtures incorporating bone ash and metakaolin exhibit pronounced strength–durability decoupling, characterized by high compressive strength alongside elevated porosity and water absorption. EDS analysis reveals that this behaviour arises from chemically competitive environments in which calcium is partitioned among silicate, aluminate, and phosphate domains, limiting the formation of a chemically continuous binding network. • Lime-activated slag was modified using nano additives and alternative precursors • Bone ash and metakaolin introduce calcium competition and network disruption • Strength, porosity and absorption were linked to microstructure and composition • EDS maps reveal that calcium partitioning governs strength–durability decoupling. • Tensile strength and transport depend on microstructural continuity

title_cn: 添加剂和替代前驱体对石灰激活矿渣体系特性的影响
abstract_cn: 石灰活化炉渣粘结剂为波特兰水泥提供了一种低碳替代品，但对前驱体的化学性质和添加剂策略仍高度敏感，尤其是在引入替代或废弃材料时。本研究探讨了合成硅酸钙水合物（C–S–H）种子和胶态纳米二氧化硅对含骨灰和煅化高岭土作为替代前驱体的石灰活化炉渣系统的综合影响。通过使用恒定的水与前驱体比和石灰用量，共评估了十六种混合物，以隔离化学和微观结构效应。机械性能通过抗压强度和劈裂抗拉强度进行评估，而耐久性相关行为则通过水吸收和孔隙率测量进行检验。通过扫描电子显微镜和能量色散光谱，包括元素映射和原子比分析，对微观结构演变和化学成分进行了分析。本研究的结果表明，抗压强度主要由反应产物的局部致密化主导，纳米二氧化硅和C–S–H种子显著增强了富含炉渣系统的强度。然而，这些改进并不总能转化为更好的抗拉强度或降低的运输特性。掺入骨灰和煅化高岭土的混合物表现出明显的强度-耐久性解耦，特征是高抗压强度同时伴随较高的孔隙率和水吸收。能量色散光谱分析表明，这种行为源于化学竞争环境，其中钙在硅酸盐、铝酸盐和磷酸盐领域之间分配，限制了化学连续绑定网络的形成。 • 石灰活化炉渣通过纳米添加剂和替代前驱体进行了改性 • 骨灰和煅化高岭土引入了钙的竞争和网络破坏 • 强度、孔隙率和吸水性与微观结构和成分相关 • EDS图谱揭示钙的分配主导了强度-耐久性解耦 • 抗拉强度和运输性能依赖于微观结构的连续性。

title: Fibre-polymer composites for structural assembly and disassembly towards reuse: Review and reassessment
abstract: The properties of light weight and corrosion resistance of fibre-polymer composites suggest them for design intentions of structural assembly and disassembly and further reuse. Although research in this regard remains limited, this paper reviews large-scale structural applications of fibre-polymer composites with consideration of these design intentions. It further reassesses several structural assembles with experimental demonstration and practice of their disassembly. In particular, for web-flange sandwich and composite beam structures, through bolts or one-sided bolts were used as the shear connections to achieve their dismantlability after the structures were loaded or failures were initiated. A steel sleeve connector was introduced to form beam-column and column-column assemblies through bolted connections. Their dismantlability was evidenced for such structural assemblies using composites of hollow sections, after ultimate failures. The sleeve connectors were further used to assemble large-scale space frame structures made of fibre-polymer composites. Dismantlability was shown after static and fatigue experiments, and it was able to disassemble the structure and reuse its components to form new structures. Available results on off-torque of bolted joints after various environmental exposures were further summarised, and future research needs were suggested for disassembly and reuse of composite structures after long-term service. • Overview on design for disassembly and reuse for various structural forms • Focused review on large-scale structural disassembly and reuse for composites • Reassessment of experimental results for disassembly of composite structures • Demonstration of disassembly for developed composite structures after loading • Summary of off-torque of bolted joints after environmental exposure in this context
title_cn: 用于结构组装和拆卸以便重复使用的纤维聚合物复合材料：回顾与重新评估
abstract_cn: 轻质和耐腐蚀的纤维聚合物复合材料的特性使其适合用于结构的组装与拆卸设计，以及进一步的重复使用。尽管在这一方面的研究仍然有限，本文回顾了纤维聚合物复合材料在大规模结构应用中的设计意图。它进一步重新评估了若干结构组装的实验示范及其拆卸实践。特别是对于网腹-法兰三明治和复合梁结构，通过使用贯通螺栓或单侧螺栓作为剪切连接，以实现这些结构在加载或故障发生后的可拆卸性。引入了钢套筒连接器，通过螺栓连接形成梁-柱和柱-柱的组装。对于这种使用空心截面的结构组装，其可拆卸性在极限失效后得到了证实。套筒连接器进一步用于组装大型空间框架结构，这些结构是由纤维聚合物复合材料制成的。经过静态和疲劳实验后显示了可拆卸性，能够拆卸结构并重复使用其组件形成新结构。还总结了各种环境暴露后螺栓连接的卸矩的现有结果，并对长期使用后复合结构的拆卸和重复使用提出了未来研究需求。• 针对各类结构形式的拆卸与重复使用设计概述 • 专注于复合材料的大规模结构拆卸与重复使用的回顾 • 对复合结构拆卸实验结果的重新评估 • 加载后开发的复合结构拆卸的示范 • 在此背景下，环境暴露后螺栓连接的卸矩总结

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Safety Performance Evaluation Model for Off-Site Construction through the Integration of Key Leading and Lagging Factors
abstract: Off-site construction, a growing alternative to traditional building methods, offers advantages such as reduced environmental impact, improved productivity, and cost efficiency. However, off-site construction introduces new and unique safety challenges across its multiple phases of fabrication, transportation, and assembly. The Experience Modification Rating (EMR), a widely used insurance metric in traditional construction, remains the primary factor used by insurance carriers to adjust workers’ compensation premiums for off-site firms. However, the industry’s reliance on an outdated metric that relies on lagging safety indicators, broad classifications, and other nonsafety factors raises significant concerns over its applicability in reflecting the distinct safety risks and operational contexts of off-site work. Therefore, this research examines the inadequacies of EMR in this sector and identifies 70 key safety factors specific to off-site processes through an extensive literature review of 76 research publications. A structured survey was used to validate the relevance and importance of these factors and was distributed to professionals from both the off-site construction and insurance industries, yielding 30 valid responses. Based on the findings, this paper explores the potential for alternative safety evaluation approaches that are off-site-specific and data-driven and considers all relevant leading and lagging factors. Thus, using the Relative Importance Index (RII), this study establishes 36 validated, high-priority safety metrics, laying the groundwork for future multicriteria-based assessment models tailored to off-site construction. Additionally, applying the Mann–Whitney U test revealed significant intergroup differences in factor prioritization between off-site construction professionals and insurance providers, highlighting key divergences in safety perception.
title_cn: 离场施工安全性能评估模型：通过关键领先因素和滞后因素的整合
abstract_cn: 离场施工作为传统建筑方法的替代方案，正在不断发展，其优点包括降低环境影响、提高生产力和成本效益。然而，离场施工在其多个阶段，包括制造、运输和组装中引入了新的独特安全挑战。经验修正率（EMR）是传统建筑中广泛使用的保险指标，仍然是保险公司用来调整离场企业工人赔偿保险费的主要因素。然而，行业对这一依赖于滞后安全指标、宽泛分类和其他非安全因素的过时指标的依赖，引发了其在反映离场工作特有安全风险和运营环境的适用性方面的重大担忧。因此，本研究探讨了EMR在该领域的不足之处，并通过对76篇研究文献的广泛回顾，确定了70个特定于离场过程的关键安全因素。为验证这些因素的相关性和重要性，采用了结构化问卷，并将其分发给离场施工和保险行业的专业人士，最终收回了30份有效反馈。基于调查结果，本文探讨了针对离场施工的替代安全评估方法的潜力，这些方法应是特定于离场的和数据驱动的，考虑所有相关的领先和滞后因素。因此，通过使用相对重要性指数（RII），本研究建立了36个经过验证的高优先级安全指标，为未来针对离场施工的多标准评估模型奠定了基础。此外，采用曼-惠特尼U检验揭示了离场施工专业人士与保险供应商在因素优先级方面的显著群体间差异，突显出安全认知方面的关键分歧。

title: Tracking and synchronization control strategy of dual-motor steer-by-wire system considering uncertain time delay
abstract: With the increasing intelligence of vehicles, the growing network communication load introduces uncertain time delays in control signal transmission, posing a more serious challenge to the precise tracking and synchronization control of dual-motor steer-by-wire systems. To address this problem, this paper proposes a tracking and synchronization control strategy. Firstly, a dynamic model of the steering motor incorporating time delays is established. On this basis, an Online Identification Adaptive Smith Predictor (OIASP) is designed to accurately estimate the uncertain time delays in the system. Furthermore, an Adaptive Hybrid Active Disturbance Rejection Control (AHADRC) controller is proposed, which utilizes a Phase Advance Extended State Observer (PAESO) to reduce phase lag in the observed states. Combined with feedforward control and linear state error feedback, a FF-LSEF composite control law is constructed, significantly enhancing the dynamic tracking performance and robustness against complex disturbances. Theoretical analysis demonstrates the favorable stability of the proposed AHADRC. Additionally, a mean deviation coupling synchronization control structure is incorporated to further enhance the synchronization accuracy of the steering system. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed control strategy in suppressing uncertain time delays and external disturbances was verified through simulation experiments and hardware-in-the-loop tests.
title_cn: 考虑不确定时间延迟的双电机线控转向系统的跟踪与同步控制策略
abstract_cn: 随着车辆智能化的不断提高，日益增长的网络通信负载导致控制信号传输中的不确定时间延迟，这对双电机线控转向系统的精确跟踪与同步控制提出了更为严峻的挑战。为了解决这一问题，本文提出了一种跟踪与同步控制策略。首先，建立了考虑时间延迟的转向电机动态模型。在此基础上，设计了一种在线识别自适应史密斯预报器（OIASP），以准确估计系统中的不确定时间延迟。此外，提出了一种自适应混合主动扰动抑制控制器（AHADRC），该控制器利用相位提前扩展状态观测器（PAESO）来减少观测状态中的相位滞后。结合前馈控制和线性状态误差反馈，构建了一种FF-LSEF复合控制法则，显著提升了动态跟踪性能及对复杂干扰的鲁棒性。理论分析证明了所提出的AHADRC的良好稳定性。此外，融合了均值偏差耦合同步控制结构，进一步增强了转向系统的同步精度。最后，通过仿真实验和硬件在环测试验证了所提出控制策略在抑制不确定时间延迟和外部干扰方面的有效性。

title: Terrain-adaptive motion planning for autonomous mobile cranes with load sway suppression
abstract: Mobile cranes are essential construction equipment for lifting and transporting materials. However, their robotisation presents significant challenges due to uneven terrain and complex payload dynamics during walking operations. This paper presents a terrain-adaptive motion planner for autonomous mobile cranes (AMCs) that navigates construction site topography whilst suppressing load sway. It integrates a vehicle posture estimator and an analytical load sway prediction model, implemented on a GPU-based parallel computation architecture. Validation was conducted through high-fidelity simulations in NVIDIA Isaac Sim. The posture estimation module demonstrated accurate predictions across elevation grid maps of varying resolutions, whilst the sway prediction model achieved accurate forecasts up to 3 s. The motion planner successfully navigated varying terrain and dynamic obstacles while maintaining sway angles below the safety threshold and achieving real-time performance. The results demonstrate the feasibility of integrating terrain adaptation with sway suppression for AMC operations in unstructured construction sites. • Developed terrain-adaptive motion planner for autonomous mobile cranes. • Integrated load sway suppression into motion planning framework. • Proposed predictive load sway model for mobile cranes on uneven terrain. • Implemented GPU-accelerated motion planning for enhanced efficiency. • Validated and investigated the motion planner with static and dynamic obstacles.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
Control and Dynamics of Mobile Robots
title_cn: 具有负载摆动抑制的自适应地形运动规划用于自主移动起重机
abstract_cn: 移动起重机是用于提升和运输材料的关键建筑设备。然而，由于行走操作过程中的不平坦地形和复杂的载荷动态，其机器人化面临重大挑战。本文提出了一种适应地形的自主移动起重机（AMC）运动规划器，能够在施工现场的地形中导航，同时抑制载荷摆动。该规划器集成了车辆姿态估计器和分析性载荷摆动预测模型，并在基于GPU的并行计算架构上实现。通过在NVIDIA Isaac Sim中进行高保真度模拟进行验证。姿态估计模块在不同分辨率的高程网格图上展示了准确的预测，而摆动预测模型则实现了最长可达3秒的准确预报。运动规划器成功应对了变化的地形和动态障碍，同时将摆动角度保持在安全阈值以下，并实现了实时性能。结果表明，将地形适应与摆动抑制相结合，以便在非结构化施工现场进行AMC操作是可行的。• 开发了适应地形的自主移动起重机运动规划器。• 将载荷摆动抑制集成到运动规划框架中。• 提出了在不平坦地形上移动起重机的预测性载荷摆动模型。• 实现了加速的GPU运动规划以提高效率。• 通过静态和动态障碍物验证并研究了运动规划器。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Feasibility of a Wearable 360° Camera for Personalized Proximity Warning on Construction Sites
abstract: Construction sites pose a high risk of struck-by accidents due to limited situational awareness. This study investigates the feasibility of using a neckband-style wearable 360° camera for proximity warning in construction environments. The proposed framework consists of a data preprocessing module—handling motion blur detection and distortion correction—and a hazard detection module, which integrates object detection with depth estimation. By identifying hazardous equipment and estimating its distance, the system provides personalized warnings to workers at risk. Field tests conducted at actual construction sites demonstrated an F1-score of 0.81 in hazard detection. Unlike fixed cameras or sensor-based systems, this approach enables omnidirectional, individualized hazard monitoring without additional site infrastructure. The wearable camera also minimizes interference with tasks, supporting stable image capture. The findings highlight the potential of combining wearable computer vision and deep learning to improve safety in complex and dynamic construction settings.
title_cn: 可穿戴360°摄像头在建筑工地个性化近距离警告的可行性研究
abstract_cn: 施工现场由于有限的情境意识，存在较高的被撞击事故风险。本研究探讨了在施工环境中使用颈带式可穿戴360°摄像头进行临近警报的可行性。所提出的框架由一个数据预处理模块和一个危险检测模块组成，前者负责处理运动模糊检测和畸变校正，后者则将物体检测与深度估计相结合。通过识别危险设备并估计其距离，该系统为面临风险的工人提供个性化的警报。在实际施工现场进行的现场测试中，危险检测的F1分数达到了0.81。与固定摄像头或基于传感器的系统不同，这种方法能够在不增加现场基础设施的情况下实现全方位的个性化危险监控。可穿戴摄像头还最小化了对任务的干扰，支持稳定的图像捕捉。研究结果突显了将可穿戴计算机视觉与深度学习结合的潜力，以提高复杂和动态施工环境中的安全性。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Two-Stage Optimization Design Framework for Tower Crane Layout Planning in Modular Integrated Construction Considering Transportation Efficiency, Operator Visibility, and Lifting Safety
abstract: With the increasing prevalence of modular integrated construction (MiC) projects, effective tower crane layout planning has become crucial to balance multiple goals, including efficiency and safety. Studies typically focus on single-objective optimization, primarily minimizing total traveling time or cost in conventional construction sites. The larger and heavier components used in MiC necessitate cranes with higher lifting capacity, which complicates planning and raises concerns about lifting safety. This study presents a two-stage optimization design framework for the single-tower crane layout in MiC. First, a multiobjective optimization model was proposed, incorporating considerations of traveling time, visibility, and lifting moment. The mathematical formulation for traveling time was modified to account for module rotation time and the distinct movement features of tower cranes. Second, heuristic algorithms, including the nondominated sorting genetic algorithm III and multiobjective particle swarm optimization, were employed to solve the proposed multiobjective optimization problem. The final optimal layout was determined using the technique for order of preference by similarity to ideal solution method based on varying weights for the model’s objectives. The proposed approach was validated through a case study of a MiC project in Hong Kong. Experimental results demonstrate a 26% increase in hoisting efficiency, a 9.3% improvement in operator visibility, and a 23.8% reduction in total lifting moment compared to the original layout. Additionally, optimizing the initial orientation of the modules leads to a 12.6% improvement in traveling time. To further support decision-making, a user interface system was developed, enabling planners to make informed choices during the planning process. This study provides a structured and practical approach for optimizing tower crane layouts in modular construction projects, integrating efficiency and safety considerations. By offering practitioners tools to achieve customized layout solutions during the preconstruction stage, this framework significantly enhances the planning process for MiC projects.
title_cn: 考虑运输效率、操作员可视性和起重安全的模块化集成建筑中塔式起重机布局规划的两阶段优化设计框架
abstract_cn: 随着模块化集成建筑（MiC）项目的日益普及，有效的塔吊布局规划已变得至关重要，以平衡多个目标，包括效率和安全性。现有研究通常集中于单目标优化，主要是最小化传统施工现场的总行程时间或成本。MiC中使用的更大、更重的构件需要更高起重能力的起重机，这使得规划变得复杂，同时提升安全性的担忧也随之增加。本研究提出了一种针对MiC中单塔吊布局的两阶段优化设计框架。首先，提出了一个多目标优化模型，考虑了行程时间、可视性和起重力矩等因素。对行程时间的数学公式进行了调整，以考虑模块旋转时间和塔吊独特的运动特征。其次，采用了启发式算法，包括非支配排序遗传算法III和多目标粒子群优化，来解决提出的多目标优化问题。最终的最优布局是基于模型目标的不同权重使用理想解相似性排序法（TOPSIS）确定的。通过对香港一个MiC项目的案例研究，对提出的方法进行了验证。实验结果表明，与原始布局相比，吊装效率提高了26%，操作可视性改善了9.3%，总起重力矩减少了23.8%。此外，优化模块的初始朝向可以使行程时间改善12.6%。为了进一步支持决策，开发了一个用户界面系统，使规划者在规划过程中能够做出明智的选择。本研究为模块化建筑项目中塔吊布局的优化提供了一种结构化和实用的方法，融合了效率和安全性考虑。通过为从业者提供在施工前阶段实现定制布局解决方案的工具，该框架显著增强了MiC项目的规划过程。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Advancing Mental Health Management in Construction Using Neurophysiological Approaches: A Systematic Review
abstract: Mental health issues are increasingly recognized as critical concerns in the construction industry. While traditional assessment methods rely on subjective self-reports, emerging neuropsychological tools offer objective and real-time measures of workers’ psychological states. However, there is limited understanding of how these tools have been applied to manage mental health for construction workers in the existing literature. Therefore, this study aims to examine the application of neurophysiological tools in managing the mental health of construction workers through a systematic review. A systematic search was conducted and 41 eligible studies were reviewed. The results were categorized based on a conceptual framework including four domains: appraisal of stressors, assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, coping interventions, and outcomes of mental health conditions. The findings revealed that (1) most studies focused on the assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, particularly stress, emotional states, and mental fatigue, demonstrating the feasibility of applying neurophysiological methods to capturing real-time psychological responses; (2) few studies addressed the appraisal of stressors or coping interventions, revealing a critical gap in understanding how construction workers perceive and manage stress in real time; and (3) electroencephalography (EEG) emerged as the most widely used method in measuring diverse mental health conditions, while the increasing adoption of multimodal integration highlights a growing trend toward more comprehensive, reliable, and accurate assessments of workers’ mental states. A key contribution of this study is the development of one of the first integrative frameworks linking neuropsychological tools with holistic mental health management in construction. It advances the current state of knowledge by clarifying the distinct role of physiological metrics (i.e., detection, monitoring, validation, and association) across four domains and offering an in-depth understanding of the practical applicability of neuropsychological methods in assessing mental health conditions. The framework also provides a practical guide for applying neurophysiological tools in mental health management of construction workers for both researchers and practitioners.
title_cn: 在建筑行业中利用神经生理学方法推进心理健康管理：系统评价
abstract_cn: 心理健康问题在建筑行业中日益受到重视。传统评估方法依赖于主观自我报告，而新兴的神经心理工具则提供了对工人心理状态的客观实时测量。然而，现有文献对这些工具在建筑工人心理健康管理中的应用了解有限。因此，本研究旨在通过系统性综述探讨神经生理工具在建筑工人心理健康管理中的应用。我们进行了系统搜索，并审查了41项符合条件的研究。结果根据一个包括四个领域的概念框架进行分类：压力源评估、心理生理结果评估、应对干预和心理健康状况结果。研究发现：(1) 大多数研究集中于心理生理结果的评估，特别是压力、情绪状态和心理疲劳，表明应用神经生理方法捕捉实时心理反应的可行性；(2) 很少有研究涉及压力源评估或应对干预，揭示了对建筑工人如何实时感知和管理压力的理解存在重要空白；(3) 脑电图（EEG）成为测量各种心理健康状况最广泛使用的方法，而多模式整合的日益采用则凸显了向更全面、可靠和准确评估工人心理状态的趋势。本研究的一项重要贡献是开发了首个将神经心理工具与建筑行业整体心理健康管理相结合的综合框架。它通过阐明生理指标（即检测、监测、验证和关联）在四个领域的不同作用，推动了当前知识的进步，同时深入理解了神经心理方法在评估心理健康状况方面的实际适用性。该框架也为研究人员和从业者提供了在建筑工人心理健康管理中应用神经生理工具的实用指南。

title: Maritime operations in ice-covered waters: A 25-year data-driven study of baltic sea ice conditions and icebreaker-ship operations
abstract: • Delivers the first long-term, data-driven insights into Baltic Sea ice navigation. • Presents a full-spectrum characterization of Baltic Sea ice conditions. • Analyzes quantitative insights into icebreaker-ship operation features. • Provides regional mapping revealing distinct operational metrics and patterns. • Establishes a comprehensive foundation for improving maritime resilience in ice-covered waters. Climate change and evolving shipping patterns have increased attention on navigation in ice-covered waters, where harsh environmental conditions may lead to operational disruptions and emergency situations. The Baltic Sea represents a distinctive case in which intensive maritime traffic coincides with pronounced seasonal sea ice variability. During winter, navigation depends on a coordinated system of icebreaker assistance and regulatory measures to maintain continuity of transport under ice-induced constraints. This study presents a 25-year data-driven analysis of ice conditions and icebreaker-ship operations in the Baltic Sea, providing a systematic empirical characterization of long-term winter navigation practices. Drawing on comprehensive datasets of ice extent, thickness, and duration, the paper generates a new spectrum combing ice thickness and ice day. With detailed operational records of icebreaker-assisted activities, the study quantifies spatial and temporal patterns in assistance demand, fleet deployment, and navigational performance across subregions. The results offer an integrated perspective on maritime operations in ice, contributing to a consolidated empirical foundation for understanding winter navigation and evidence-based discussion on resilience and emergency preparedness in ice-affected maritime transport environments.
title_cn: 冰覆盖水域的海洋作业：基于25年数据的波罗的海冰况与破冰船-船舶作业研究
abstract_cn:
• 提供对波罗的海冰航行的第一手长期数据驱动洞察。  
• 展示波罗的海冰情条件的全方位特征。  
• 分析冰破船与货船操作特征的定量洞察。  
• 提供区域地图，揭示不同的操作指标和模式。  
• 建立全面的基础，以改善冰覆水域的海洋韧性。  

气候变化和航运模式的演变使得在冰覆水域的航行备受关注，恶劣的环境条件可能导致操作中断和紧急情况。波罗的海是一个独特的案例，密集的海上交通与显著的季节性海冰变异相吻合。冬季，航行依赖于冰破船的协调援助系统和监管措施，以维持在冰层约束下的运输连续性。本研究提供对波罗的海冰情和冰破船-船只操作的25年数据驱动分析，系统性地表征长期冬季航行实践。通过综合冰的范围、厚度和持续时间的数据集，论文生成了一个新的组合谱系，包括冰厚度和冰日。借助详细的冰破船协助活动的操作记录，研究量化了各子区域援助需求、舰队部署和航行表现的空间和时间模式。结果为冰区航运操作提供了一个综合视角，为理解冬季航行以及在受冰影响的海上运输环境下的韧性和应急准备的循证讨论奠定了坚实的经验基础。

title: Deliberate or Emergent? How Organizations Adopt Hybrid Project Management
abstract: Hybrid project management combines traditional and agile approaches for managing complex projects. While its benefits and setups are well studied, how organizations adopt and implement hybrid project management remains unclear. Hence, this study addresses this gap through a multiple-case design, finding that hybrid project management adoption is shaped by organizational context, leadership, and iterative adjustments to evolving needs. It proposes a Hybrid Project Management Adoption Model, featuring a novel distinction between conscious adoption (a deliberate, structured transition) and unconscious adoption (an organic, emergent evolution). The study advances hybrid project management research by theorizing adoption as a dual-path process and explaining how practices evolve under organizational conditions.
title_cn: 故意还是自发？组织如何采用混合项目管理
abstract_cn: 混合项目管理结合了传统与敏捷方法以管理复杂项目。尽管其优势和设置已有充分研究，但组织如何采纳和实施混合项目管理仍然不明确。因此，本研究通过多案例设计解决了这一空白，发现混合项目管理的采纳受到组织环境、领导力及对不断变化需求的迭代调整的影响。研究提出了一个混合项目管理采纳模型，强调了自觉采纳（一个有意且结构化的过渡）与非自觉采纳（一个有机且自发的演变）之间的新区别。该研究通过将采纳理论化为双路径过程，并解释在组织条件下实践如何演变，从而推动了混合项目管理研究的发展。

title: From detection to decision: integrating contextual metadata into an AI-based hospital hazard detection system
abstract: • Two-stage model integrates metadata to improve hospital hazard detection. • Reduces false detections by leveraging human expertise on hazard occurrences. • Enhanced cross-location generalization without model retraining. • Enables lower detection thresholds while maintaining high precision. • Various object detectors assessed on realistic indoor hazard scenarios. Maintaining environmental safety in hospitals is critical for preventing injuries and infections, yet manual monitoring is resource-intensive and prone to coverage gaps. This study presents a novel, two-stage AI framework for automated hazard detection. We first evaluated three state-of-the-art architectures—YOLOv8, DETR, and EfficientDet—finding that while all models demonstrated strong in-domain performance, they suffered significant accuracy loss in unseen areas due to domain shift. Among these models, YOLOv8 demonstrated superior baseline robustness. To address this generalization gap, we developed a second, metadata-augmented refinement layer that integrates hospital-specific spatial and temporal hazard information. Uniquely, this approach incorporates expert operational knowledge externally during inference rather than embedding it during training, thereby reducing the need for extensive annotated datasets or frequent model retraining. Experiments conducted in a major tertiary medical center demonstrate that metadata augmentation significantly improves detection reliability in cross-domain scenarios. The system operates effectively at lower objectiveness thresholds, achieving the high recall essential for safety–critical applications while simultaneously improving precision. Overall, the proposed framework offers a scalable and data-efficient solution for real-time environmental risk management. By bridging the gap between visual AI capabilities and the rigorous safety demands of healthcare facilities, it provides a practical pathway for enhancing hazard detection, situational awareness, and operational resilience.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 从检测到决策：将上下文元数据整合到基于AI的医院危险检测系统中
abstract_cn: • 两阶段模型整合元数据以提高医院危险检测。 • 通过利用人类在危险发生方面的专业知识减少误报。 • 增强跨位置的泛化能力，无需重训练模型。 • 实现较低的检测阈值，同时保持高精度。 • 在现实室内危险场景中评估了多种目标检测器。 在医院中维护环境安全对于防止伤害和感染至关重要，但手动监测资源密集且容易出现覆盖缺口。本研究提出了一种新颖的两阶段人工智能框架用于自动化危险检测。我们首先评估了三种最先进的架构——YOLOv8、DETR 和 EfficientDet，发现尽管所有模型在领域内性能强劲，但由于领域转移，它们在未见区域的准确性具有显著损失。在这些模型中，YOLOv8展现出更强的基线鲁棒性。为了解决这一泛化差距，我们开发了第二个元数据增强的精炼层，该层整合了医院特定的空间和时间危险信息。独特的是，这种方法在推理过程中外部整合专家操作知识，而不是在训练过程中嵌入，从而减少了对广泛标注数据集或频繁模型重训练的需求。在一家大型三级医疗中心进行的实验表明，元数据增强显著提高了跨域场景中的检测可靠性。该系统在较低的客观性阈值下有效运行，实现了安全关键应用所需的高召回率，同时提高了精度。总体而言，所提出的框架为实时环境风险管理提供了一种可扩展且数据高效的解决方案。通过弥合视觉人工智能能力与医疗设施严格安全要求之间的差距，它为提升危险检测、情境意识和操作韧性提供了实用途径。
